user.title: Volkswagen Connect
user.description: Log in with your Volkswagen ID. You'll get an email verification code (OTP) for the volkswagen.de data source — enter it on the next step. (Optional/experimental: also enable a 15-minute EU Data Act request at https://eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com.)

otp.title: Two-factor code
otp.description: Volkswagen emailed a verification code for the volkswagen.de data source (battery, charging, odometer, service, warning lights, image). Enter it here. You can cancel to skip it, but then no data is available yet.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Volkswagen. Please try again.
error.invalid_otp: That verification code was not accepted. Check the latest email and try again.
